title: Gooey Quick Fix Indian Trout Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy vegan-friendly dish featuring bitter greens like mustard or arugula for added texture and flavor in a gooey, spicy stir-fry with trout.
instructions: Clean and season the trout with salt and pepper. Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic to the hot oil and stir-fry for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Add mustard greens or arugula and stir well, cooking until wilted (about 2 minutes).
Gently slide in trout fillets onto the greens. Cover with a lid and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes or until fish is opaque throughout and cooked through.
Remove from heat, add garam masala powder and green chili (if using) to the wok and stir well until fully integrated into the mixture.
Serve hot over rice or as a side dish with naan bread. Garnish with fresh cilantro if desired.
